queries.question: Show developmental milestones and child's age in order of the age
queries.sql: SELECT MilestoneRecords.physicalMilestones, MilestoneRecords.childAge FROM MileStoneRecords ORDER BY MilestoneRecords.childAge
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?physicalmilestones ?childage WHERE {
  ?milestonerecords a :MilestoneRecords .
  ?milestonerecords p:physicalMilestones ?physicalmilestones .
  ?milestonerecords p:childAge ?childage .
  ?milestonerecords p:childAge ?childage_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?childage_o)

queries.question: Show developmental milestones and child's age in order of the age
queries.sql: SELECT MilestoneRecords.physicalMilestones, cognitiveMilestones, MilestoneRecords.childAge FROM MileStoneRecords ORDER BY MilestoneRecords.childAge
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?physicalmilestones ?cognitivemilestones ?childage WHERE {
  ?milestonerecords a :MilestoneRecords .
  ?milestonerecords p:physicalMilestones ?physicalmilestones .
  ?milestonerecords p:cognitiveMilestones ?cognitivemilestones .
  ?milestonerecords p:childAge ?childage .
  ?milestonerecords p:childAge ?childage_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?childage_o)

queries.question: Show how many students have achieved each developmental milestone
queries.sql: SELECT MilestoneRecords.physicalMilestones, Count(*) as Pupil_Count FROM MileStoneRecords
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
SELECT ?pm (COUNT(?x) AS ?n) WHERE { ?x a :MilestoneRecords ; p:physicalMilestones ?pm } GROUP BY ?pm
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold SQL omits GROUP BY (returns 1 arbitrary row); NL intent = #students per phy

queries.question: Show how many students have achieved each developmental milestone
queries.sql: SELECT MilestoneRecords.cognitiveMilestones, Count(*) as Pupil_Count FROM MileStoneRecords
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (SAMPLE(?cognitivemilestones) AS ?cognitivemilestoness) (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?milestonerecords a :MilestoneRecords .
  ?milestonerecords p:cognitiveMilestones ?cognitivemilestones .
}

queries.question: Show how many students have achieved each developmental milestone
queries.sql: SELECT MilestoneRecords.physicalMilestones, cognitiveMilestones, Count(*) as Pupil_Count FROM MileStoneRecords
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
SELECT ?pm ?cm (COUNT(?x) AS ?n) WHERE { ?x a :MilestoneRecords ; p:physicalMilestones ?pm ; p:cognitiveMilestones ?cm } GROUP BY ?pm ?cm
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold SQL omits GROUP BY; NL intent = #students per (physical, cognitive) milesto
